title: GNUI RP
description: an alternative UI resource pack from the vanilla game
body:
> ## NOTE  
> This resource pack has been abandoned! as much better alternative exists!  
> https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark  
> Thanks for trying!  




an alternative UI resource pack for the vanilla game.
main features being in dark mode, and everything having a titlebar.

Visit the Gallery section of the page for more previews
![Beacon beam UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fHkNorKr/images/7ed9f7997ea52dc73a017d59bed427c1d1bc00b4.png)
